1 import type { PageLoad } from './$types' 2 import { createClient } from '$lib/gql/client' 3 import { gql } from 'graphql-request' 4 5 const ARTIFACT_DETAIL_QUERY = gql` 6 query ArtifactDetail($projectID: ID!, $id: ID!) { 7 artifact(projectID: $projectID, id: $id) { 8 id 9 path 10 title 11 mediaType 12 staleness 13 description 14 updatedAt 15 ddxFrontmatter 16 content 17 } 18 } 19 ` 20 21 export interface ArtifactDetail { 22 id: string 23 path: string 24 title: string 25 mediaType: string 26 staleness: string 27 description: string | null 28 updatedAt: string | null 29 ddxFrontmatter: string | null 30 content: string | null 31 } 32 33 interface ArtifactDetailResult { 34 artifact: ArtifactDetail | null 35 } 36 37 export const load: PageLoad = async ({ params, url, fetch }) => { 38 const client = createClient(fetch as unknown as typeof globalThis.fetch) 39 const data = await client.request(ARTIFACT_DETAIL_QUERY, { 40 projectID: params.projectId, 41 id: decodeURIComponent(params.artifactId) 42 }) 43 44 // Build content URL for binary types (images, PDFs, unknown). 45 // The UI uses this URL for , , and download links. 46 const contentUrl = data.artifact 47 ? `/api/projects/${encodeURIComponent(params.projectId)}/artifact-content?path=${encodeURIComponent(data.artifact.path)}` 48 : null 49 50 // Preserve back-link state so the detail page can return to the filtered list. 51 const back = url.searchParams.get('back') ?? null 52 53 return { 54 nodeId: params.nodeId, 55 projectId: params.projectId, 56 artifactId: params.artifactId, 57 artifact: data.artifact, 58 contentUrl, 59 back 60 } 61 } 62

1	import type { PageLoad } from './$types'
2	import { createClient } from '$lib/gql/client'
3	import { gql } from 'graphql-request'
4	
5	const RUN_DETAIL_QUERY = gql`
6		query RunDetail($id: ID!) {
7			run(id: $id) {
8				id
9				layer
10				status
11				projectID
12				beadId
13				parentRunId
14				childRunIds
15				startedAt
16				completedAt
17				durationMs
18	
19				queueInputs
20				stopCondition
21				selectedBeadIds
22	
23				baseRevision
24				resultRevision
25				worktreePath
26				mergeOutcome
27				checkResults
28	
29				harness
30				provider
31				model
32				promptSummary
33				powerMin
34				powerMax
35				tokensIn
36				tokensOut
37				costUsd
38				outputExcerpt
39				evidenceLinks
40			}
41		}
42	`
43	
44	export interface RunDetail {
45		id: string
46		layer: string
47		status: string
48		projectID: string | null
49		beadId: string | null
50		parentRunId: string | null
51		childRunIds: string[]
52		startedAt: string | null
53		completedAt: string | null
54		durationMs: number | null
55	
56		queueInputs: string | null
57		stopCondition: string | null
58		selectedBeadIds: string[] | null
59	
60		baseRevision: string | null
61		resultRevision: string | null
62		worktreePath: string | null
63		mergeOutcome: string | null
64		checkResults: string | null
65	
66		harness: string | null
67		provider: string | null
68		model: string | null
69		promptSummary: string | null
70		powerMin: number | null
71		powerMax: number | null
72		tokensIn: number | null
73		tokensOut: number | null
74		costUsd: number | null
75		outputExcerpt: string | null
76		evidenceLinks: string[] | null
77	}
78	
79	const PARENT_RUN_QUERY = gql`
80		query ParentRunParent($id: ID!) {
81			run(id: $id) {
82				parentRunId
83			}
84		}
85	`
86	
87	export const load: PageLoad = async ({ params, fetch }) => {
88		const client = createClient(fetch as unknown as typeof globalThis.fetch)
89		const data = await client.request<{ run: RunDetail | null }>(RUN_DETAIL_QUERY, {
90			id: params.runId
91		})
92	
93		let grandparentRunId: string | null = null
94		if (data.run?.layer === 'run' && data.run.parentRunId) {
95			const parentData = await client.request<{ run: { parentRunId: string | null } | null }>(
96				PARENT_RUN_QUERY,
97				{ id: data.run.parentRunId }
98			)
99			grandparentRunId = parentData.run?.parentRunId ?? null
100		}
101	
102		return {
103			nodeId: params.nodeId,
104			projectId: params.projectId,
105			runId: params.runId,
106			run: data.run,
107			grandparentRunId
108		}
109	}

input.old_string:
const ARTIFACT_DETAIL_QUERY = gql`
	query ArtifactDetail($projectID: ID!, $id: ID!) {
		artifact(projectID: $projectID, id: $id) {
			id
			path
			title
			mediaType
			staleness
			description
			updatedAt
			ddxFrontmatter
			content
		}
	}
`

export interface ArtifactDetail {
	id: string
	path: string
	title: string
	mediaType: string
	staleness: string
	description: string | null
	updatedAt: string | null
	ddxFrontmatter: string | null
	content: string | null
}

interface ArtifactDetailResult {
	artifact: ArtifactDetail | null
}

data.text:
Committed.

Changes:
- **Artifact detail** (`/artifacts/[artifactId]`): Added provenance panel rendered when `generatedBy` is present. Shows producing run id (linked, or disabled with tooltip when run is not found), truncated prompt summary, and a fresh/stale source-hash badge. Probes `run(id:)` at load to drive enabled/disabled state.
- **Run detail** (`/runs/[runId]`): Now fetches `artifactId` and looks up the produced artifact's title; renders a "Produced artifact" link in the common-fields grid.
- Staleness in the artifacts list already reflects source-hash status only (server `computeSidecarStaleness` is artifact-local, no `depends_on` cascade for sidecar/generated artifacts).

`bun run check` passes with 0 errors; `go build ./...` clean.
